# Module 00 — Quiz (DP-700 Exam Profile)

Each question cites a primary source in its explanation. Answer key at bottom.

1. Which credential does passing exam DP-700 earn?
   - A. Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate
   - B. Microsoft Certified: Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate
   - C. Microsoft Certified: Fabric Data Engineer Associate
   - D. Microsoft Certified: Azure Database Administrator Associate

2. The DP-700 exam is scored on a scale of 1–1000. What is the passing score?
   - A. 650
   - B. 700
   - C. 750
   - D. 800

3. Which exams are prerequisites for DP-700?
   - A. AZ-900 and DP-900 are required.
   - B. DP-203 is required.
   - C. No exam is required; AZ-900 and DP-900 are recommended only.
   - D. AZ-204 is required.

4. How many domains does the DP-700 Study Guide define, and roughly what is each domain's weight?
   - A. Two domains, roughly 50/50.
   - B. Three domains, each roughly 30–35%.
   - C. Four domains, each roughly 25%.
   - D. Five domains, each roughly 20%.

5. Which of the following is part of Domain 2 (Ingest and transform data) rather than Domain 1 or 3?
   - A. Configure workspace settings and deployment pipelines.
   - B. Implement Dataflow Gen2 to transform batch data.
   - C. Identify and resolve errors using the monitoring hub.
   - D. Review capacity metrics app dashboards.

6. Which two Microsoft Fabric concepts are new to DP-700 compared to the retired DP-203?
   - A. Synapse dedicated SQL pool distributions and PolyBase.
   - B. OneLake shortcuts and Dataflow Gen2 (Power Query M).
   - C. PolyBase and Mapping Data Flows.
   - D. Stream Analytics windowing and SU scaling.

7. What is the officially published duration of the DP-700 exam (actual exam time, not seat time)?
   - A. 60 minutes
   - B. 90 minutes
   - C. 100 minutes
   - D. 120 minutes

8. Which Microsoft-sanctioned resource should you use to benchmark readiness before booking?
   - A. ExamTopics DP-700 dumps.
   - B. Microsoft Learn practice assessment for DP-700.
   - C. Any Udemy practice test marketplace.
   - D. Third-party braindump PDFs.

9. How is DP-700 renewed once earned?
   - A. Retake the full proctored exam every two years.
   - B. Pay a renewal fee with no assessment.
   - C. Take a free online renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn annually.
   - D. Earn any other Microsoft associate certification.

10. You have 110 hours to prepare. Based on the DP-700 domain weights, roughly how many hours should each domain receive?
    - A. 10 / 80 / 20
    - B. ~35 / ~40 / ~35 (roughly equal, weighted by study guide)
    - C. 90 / 10 / 10
    - D. 50 / 50 / 10

---

## Answer key

1. **C** — [Certification page](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/fabric-data-engineer-associate/).
2. **B** — [Exam DP-700 page](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/exams/dp-700/) (700/1000 scaled score applies across Microsoft certifications).
3. **C** — [DP-700 Study Guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/dp-700) lists no required prerequisites; AZ-900 and DP-900 are recommended.
4. **B** — [DP-700 Study Guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/dp-700) defines three domains, each in the 30–35% range.
5. **B** — Dataflow Gen2 falls under Ingest and transform; workspace settings and monitoring hub are Domains 1 and 3 respectively ([Study Guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/dp-700)).
6. **B** — OneLake shortcuts and Dataflow Gen2 (Power Query M) are Fabric-specific ([Fabric overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric/get-started/microsoft-fabric-overview), [Dataflow Gen2](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric/data-factory/dataflows-gen2-overview)).
7. **C** — 100 minutes of exam time ([Exam DP-700 page](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/exams/dp-700/)).
8. **B** — The Microsoft Learn practice assessment is the only Microsoft-sanctioned practice resource ([Practice assessment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/exams/dp-700/practice/assessment)). Third-party dumps violate Microsoft exam policy.
9. **C** — [Certification renewal](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/renew-your-microsoft-certification).
10. **B** — Each domain is 30–35% per the [Study Guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/dp-700), so roughly equal allocation.
